We are working in repo: hataka-coden/First-Foray-Into-Modding- (Stellaris mod).

Step 0 — Ground truth only:
- I am about to provide the mod folder tree + selected file contents (descriptor.mod, map/*, common/*, docs/*).
- Until you see them, do not invent file paths, effect names, or existing templates.
- If something is missing, ask.

- Identify the “gold standard” template files for style (headers/comments/README style).

  B) post-generation hyperlane cleanup
  C) runtime spawning corridor approach
- For each: risks, testing implications, and what files/folders would be involved (based on the repo map you just built).
